title: Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays * Deafness - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Early Intervention for Children with Disabilities/Delays * Deafness 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - African American Community Deafness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL EARLY INTERVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on developing collaborative partnerships with parents and children that facilitate spoken language development through listening. Offers intensive auditory-oral intervention, on-site audiologist who does hearing aid analysis and cochlear implant mapping, regular home and school sessions, facilitated toddler groups with both children with typical hearing and children who are deaf and support and information for families. 2860 SE Holgate Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Newborns to age 3 with a hearing impairment Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 235-6551 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL EARLY INTERVENTION
